block_00: Stock and crypto news of the week inside
block_03: Electric vehicle maker Tesla sold $936 million worth of Bitcoin in the second quarter, according to a shareholder deck released ahead of its earnings call on Wednesday. Elon Musk swore not to sell any Bitcoin in March, but Tesla cashed out 75% of its Bitcoin holdings amid the crypto winter just months later.
block_07: The share price rose by 39% this week despite the news, that the ex-Coinbase manager was arrested in US Crypto Insider-Trading Case. Should we expect a bearish trend in the near future?
block_10: The share price fell by almost 9% this week after the company lowered its full-year free cash flow guidance for 2022 from $10.5 billion to $10 billion on Monday. Will the trend reverse next week?
